author: nc1234
content:
Lighthouse not serving datacolumns due to orphaned block at the first gloas slot: https://github.com/sigp/lighthouse/issues/9638
Teku not serving reqresp for finalized payload envelope: https://github.com/Consensys/teku/issues/10885#issuecomment-4975538981
Prysm not cherry-picking recent invalid payload envelope fix to devnet 7 branch: https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1526470317315457165/1526748083365482556

Meanwhile I will see how to harden our range sync on lodestar.
